title: Create: Kryp
description: Create: Kryp is a modpack focused on space and the Create mod, and it even has VR support.
body:
**Create: Kryp is a big modpack adding over 400+ mods.
The modpack adds a ton of mods, like new biomes, both underground and above ground, using [Biomes O' Plenty](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/biomes-o-plenty), [Oh The Biomes We've Gone](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/oh-the-biomes-weve-gone), [Regions Unexplored](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/regions-unexplored), [YUNG's Cave Biomes](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/yungs-cave-biomes), [Alex's Caves](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/alexs-caves), [BetterNether Forge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/betternether-forge), [BetterEnd Forge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/betterend-forge), [Incendium](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/incendium) and [Cliff under a Tree](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/clifftree-mod). New dimensions like [The Aether](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aether) and [The Twilight Forest](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-twilight-forest) and you can even go to space using [Create: Northstar - Redux](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/northstar-redux), among many other mods to explore.**






Recommendations

Have 16GB or more of RAM in your system the modpack tends to use 6 to 8GB of RAM.

Disable shaders before joining a world or server when playing in VR, as visual artifacts might appear if you disable them in-game.

**Current [Create](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create) version is [6.0.8](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create/files/7178761).**

[CurseForge version](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/create-kryp)

[Modlist](https://www.modpackindex.com/modpack/90830/create-kryp)
